name: Kioku Search UI Integration
objective: Wire the existing /api/kioku/search backend into the UI: create a useKiokuSearch composable, plug it into tasks/index.vue search bar, and add an end-to-end smoke test.
exit_criteria: app/composables/useKiokuSearch.ts exists and its unit tests pass.
tasks/index.vue search bar calls /api/kioku/search; results come from Kioku, not client-side filter.
Integration smoke test confirms seeded vault tasks are returned for a known keyword.
bun test passes with no new failures after all 3 subtasks are done.
